title: rothmannia octomera
intro: Rothmannia octomera, also known as the eight-fruited Rothmannia, is a flowering plant species native to tropical Africa, belonging to the family Rubiaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional African medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rothmannia octomera include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions, making it a valuable remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be used to extract its medicinal compounds and apply them topically or ingest them as a tea or tincture.
